overall.description: A truck simulator game showing a first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night. The driver approaches and overtakes another truck while snow falls continuously and windshield wipers operate.

events.description: yellow truck becomes visible ahead in the distance on the same lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway, approaching a slower vehicle ahead with headlights illuminating the falling snow

notable_agents.action: yellow truck with trailer driving ahead in the right lane, moving slower than ego

entered.detail: two-lane highway covered in snow with reflective lane markings visible in headlight beam
metal guardrail running along the left shoulder of the road
blue directional highway sign with white symbols indicating exits

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway at night. Headlights cut through the darkness and falling snow, illuminating the road ahead. A yellow truck becomes visible in the distance, driving in the same lane. The guardrail runs along the left side while snow-covered trees line both sides of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy highway with overhead sign structure

events.description: passing under overhead sign gantry spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: following the yellow truck at a steady distance, maintaining position in the right lane

notable_agents.action: yellow truck maintaining steady speed directly ahead in the right lane

entered.detail: large metal overhead structure supporting blue directional signs spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck continues following the yellow truck ahead, closing the distance slightly. The road curves gently through the snowy landscape. An overhead sign gantry appears in the distance and is passed underneath midway through the segment. The blue highway sign from the previous segment passes out of view behind the vehicle.

events.description: ego vehicle signals and moves into the left lane to begin overtaking the truck
ego vehicle completes passing the yellow truck and begins merging back to the right lane

agents.ego_description: executing an overtake maneuver by moving to the left lane, accelerating past the yellow truck, and returning to the right lane

notable_agents.action: yellow truck being overtaken, remaining in the right lane as ego passes on the left

segments.scene_description: The driver initiates an overtake of the slower yellow truck. The vehicle moves into the left lane and accelerates past the truck, which remains visible to the right. After passing, the truck merges back into the right lane ahead. The overhead sign structure from the previous segment is now behind the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy highway with clear road ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy highway with clear road ahead after completing the overtake

entered.detail: blue highway directional sign visible in the distance ahead indicating upcoming exits

segments.scene_description: With the overtake complete, the truck continues driving on the empty snowy highway. The road ahead is clear with no other vehicles in sight. A blue highway sign appears in the distance, and the guardrails continue along both sides of the road through the snowy forest landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway at night, transitioning from following another vehicle to an open, clear road. It begins with headlights cutting through the darkness and falling snow, illuminating a yellow truck driving ahead amidst a landscape of snow-covered trees and guardrails. As the road curves gently, the camera passes underneath an overhead sign gantry while closing the distance to the vehicle in front. The scene then shifts as the driver accelerates into the left lane to overtake the yellow truck, moving past it before merging back into the right lane. Finally, the road opens up into an empty stretch of highway, with a distant blue sign appearing as the vehicle continues through the wintry forest.
